name: Propolis
description: Propolis is a resinous substance produced by bees to protect their hives, packed with flavonoids, amino acids, and vitamins with natural antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. In skincare, it accelerates wound healing, calms irritated skin, and helps prevent acne breakouts while delivering deep nourishment without clogging pores.
